turns.content: 0.6 N*m through an 8:1 at 90% efficient - torque out?
Torque multiplies by the ratio, then efficiency takes its cut:
4.32 N*m. Eight times the input is the ideal 4.8; the 90% knocks it to 4.32. Speed went the other way - down 8x.
